reviews.comment:
Es genial que no importa en dónde estés, siempre va a haber cerca una Full en donde puedas pasar un rato, descansar, tomar un café y recuperarte del frío o del calor que haga. Aguante YPF y sus Full!

(Translated by Google)
It's great that no matter where you are, there's always a Full station nearby where you can stop for a while, relax, have a coffee, and escape the cold or heat. Long live YPF and its Full stations!
